settings.label: Renderer Name
settings.description: UPnP friendly name visible to control points. Supports spaces (e.g., 'Devialet Target').

settings.label: Diretta Target
settings.description: Target device index (1 = first detected)

settings.label: UPnP Port
settings.description: UPnP control port (HTTP server uses port+1)

settings.label: Gapless Playback
settings.description: Seamless playback between tracks

settings.label: Log Level
settings.description: Logging verbosity

settings.label: Network Interface
settings.description: Interface name (eth0) or IP address. Empty = auto-detect.

settings.label: Minimal UPnP Mode
settings.description: Disables position polling and event notifications for improved audio quality (reduced CPU overhead). Recommended for JPlay iOS, LMS/slim2UPnP (fixes position drift), and Roon. Progress bar may become approximate.

settings.label: Audio Core(s)
settings.description: Pin Diretta worker thread to CPU core(s). Single core (e.g., '3') or comma-separated list (e.g., '3,4'). Empty = no pinning.

settings.label: Decode Core(s)
settings.description: Pin decode thread to CPU core(s). Single core or comma-separated list (e.g., '6,7,8'). Empty = no pinning.

settings.label: Other Core(s)
settings.description: Pin decode/UPnP threads to CPU core(s). Single core or comma-separated list (e.g., '6,7,8'). Empty = no pinning.

settings.label: PCM buffer (seconds)
settings.description: Local PCM buffer size in seconds. Leave empty to use default (0.5).

settings.label: PCM remote buffer (seconds)
settings.description: Remote (Qobuz/Tidal) PCM buffer size in seconds. Leave empty to use default (1.0).

settings.label: DSD buffer (seconds)
settings.description: DSD buffer size in seconds. Leave empty to use default (0.8).

settings.label: PCM prefill (ms)
settings.description: PCM prefill before starting playback. Leave empty to use default (80 ms).

settings.label: PCM remote prefill (ms)
settings.description: Remote PCM prefill. Leave empty to use default (150 ms).

settings.label: DSD prefill (ms)
settings.description: DSD prefill before starting playback. Leave empty to use default (200 ms).

settings.label: RT Priority (SCHED_FIFO)
settings.description: Real-time priority for the audio worker thread (1-99). Higher = more priority. Default: 50. Translated to --rt-priority CLI; only affects DRUP's audio worker thread, not the rest of the system.

settings.label: Thread Mode
settings.description: SDK thread scheduling bitmask: 1=Critical, 2=NoShortSleep, 4=NoSleep4Core, 8=SocketNoBlock, 16=Occupied, 2048=NoSleepForce, 8192=NoJumboFrame

settings.label: Transfer Mode
settings.description: Packet sizing and scheduling strategy

settings.label: Cycle Time (us)
settings.description: Max packet transmission cycle time in microseconds. Empty = auto-calculated.

settings.label: Cycle Min Time (us)
settings.description: Min cycle time in microseconds (random mode only)

settings.label: Info Cycle (us)
settings.description: Info packet cycle time in microseconds (default: 100000 = 100ms)

settings.label: Target Profile Limit (us)
settings.description: 0 = SelfProfile (host-side only), >0 = TargetProfile with auto-adaptation (default: 200)

settings.label: MTU (bytes)
settings.description: Force specific MTU. Empty = auto-detect. Common values: 1500, 4096, 9000
